name: Oyster Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the oysters in their own juice, using all of the above ingredients.
2. In a food processor, combine olives (stuffed with pimentos), drained oysters, bacon, a small amount of bacon drippings, garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, and sweet relish.
3. Process until well pulverized.
4. Chill thoroughly before serving on crackers.
